creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build of the web site failed if make obj is used.

How-To-Repeat: cvs -QR co www
cd www/en/
make WEB_ONLY=YES obj all

/usr/bin/perl5 ../../en/internal/homepage.pl > homepage.inc
Can't open perl script "../../en/internal/homepage.pl": No such file or director
y
*** Error code 2

Stop in /tmp/www/ru/internal.
*** Error code 1 (ignored)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /tmp/www/ru.
*** Error code 1 (ignored)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /tmp/www/en.
